perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with braided hair and a white tank top presents a large box for a Moyu branded 'Coin Pusher' building set. (2) She uses scissors to open the box and begins sorting thousands of yellow, white, and grey plastic bricks onto a wooden desk. (3) A series of montage clips shows her following an instruction manual and building the base and internal motorized mechanism. (4) She changes outfits twice (a green sweatshirt, then a striped shirt) to indicate time passing over several days. (5) In one segment, two children are seen sitting at a table behind her. (6) She completes the build, featuring a yellow arcade-style cabinet with white clouds on top. (7) She demonstrates the motorized function by dropping plastic coins into the slot and watching them being pushed.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals speak in Mandarin over upbeat, medium-tempo pop background music with a synthesized beat. (2) The sound of plastic bricks clattering on a wooden surface and paper rustling becomes more prominent. (3) The music maintains a consistent, cheerful rhythm as the female voice narrations the difficulty and progress. (4) The audio transitions to include a mechanical whirring sound of a small motor. (5) Background chatter from children is briefly audible. (6) The music ends on a bright, final note as the narrator expresses satisfaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "電動推幣機樂高" (Electric Coin Pusher Lego) - Hook text. (2) "2093片" (2093 pieces) - Descriptive text for difficulty level. (3) "第二天" (The second day), "第三次" (The third time), "第四天" (The fourth day) - Temporal markers showing progression. (4) "完成" (Finished) - Decorative text in red to mark success. (5) "繼續努力" (Keep working hard) - Floating emotional text overlays during the difficult phase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Unboxing -> Multi-day Building Montage -> Final Functional Demonstration.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 children (passers-by/secondary characters) in the background at 0:15.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long hair styled in pigtail braids, wearing multiple casual outfits including a white tank top, a green sweatshirt, and a striped dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A creative studio or office with shelves filled with collectible toys, including Be@rbricks, Tom & Jerry figures, and other building block models.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the extensive process of assembling a complex 2093-piece motorized building set. The video highlights the creator's dedication over several days and provides a satisfying 'payoff' by demonstrating the functional coin pusher at the end.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator focuses entirely on the unboxing, building, and demonstration of a specific branded product, Moyu.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Outfit changes to show time progression, rapid 'building block' clatter SFX, and high-energy Mandarin narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media 'challenge' tropes, emphasizing the large number of pieces (2093) to hook the viewer's curiosity about whether it can be completed.
